title: Porcelain Mortar and Pestle, Spice Garlic Herb Grinder,Mixing Grinding Bowl, Crusher Set,Kitchen Tools- 3.2inch
description:
About this item
1. All Part is white, which fits well with the kitchen, small size, beautiful and generous, and can be placed anywhere in the kitchen.
2. Made of ceramic, safe and hygienic, very durable.
3. Great for grinding species, herbs, medicine, or other substance.
4. Internal frosted texture can increased friction,better for grinding.
5. Comfortable grip, easy to clean.
reviews_5s: Perfect for grinding pills for kitty, but also good in the kitchen to mash garlic or ginger, very happy with purchase, highly recommend!This mortar and pestle is very nice. I got the small size for crushing pills and it works very well. I do multiple pills at one time and it works perfectly. As others have mentioned the tip of the crusher and inside bottom of the bowl are rough and not smooth. I was a little concerned about that at first but it actually seems to be just what is needed! I would definitely recommend this.It’s small but exactly the size I needed. I didn’t want anything elaborate, so this fit this bill. Seems pretty solid and definitely fairly priced. It’s super cute sitting in my kitchen on top of my spice rack. If you are wanting to grind large portions, go up a size, but for crushing large pills it’s perfect for. (I can’t swallow large pills.) it’s smoothe in texture everywhere except the bottom of the grinder and bottom of the bowl. This helps to crush and grind up whatever you want to pulverize.I shopped to get what I wanted at the best price that I could from a reliable source. This proved to be exactly that. It turned out to not really great for my purpose, but I knew that buying one was the only way to find out. I knew I was taking a risk, but that was my choice, and a price this low, it’s not a big deal. The set is high quality and works as it’s supposed to.I'm drying weeds/herbs and this is super for grinding up whatever I've dried. Small yet very handy.The most perfect size!! I'm in love, works gert for my small hands! Feel very in control. Thank youIt looks great. It is the perfect weight. It's a good value for the money and is easy to cleanworks great for all usesSmall and exactly what I needed.Needed to crush my dog’s pill to place in his food!
reviews_1s: Product broke into pieces while using for 4th time. Which clearly shows how worth it is.Very small. Does not really grind herbs because its just a bowl. You have to use alot of force because the bowl & handle is so smallThe pestle is not properly formed at the bottom. Just not well made.
